MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-24-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT

Appearances (by Zoom):
Nicholas Yowarski, Esq. 310-933-4271 Quill Arrow LLP for Plaintiff.
Jesse Valancia, Esq. 949-777-6032 the Erskine Law Group for DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS.

RULING - A R G U E D. Mr. Yowarski apologizes for the late filing of opposition papers. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

General Motors LLC's unopposed motion to strike is granted with leave to amend.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-24-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Nicholas Yowarski, Esq. 310-933-4271 Quill Arrow LLP for Plaintiff.
Jesse Valancia, Esq. 949-777-6032 the Erskine Law Group for DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS.

RULING - A R G U E D. Mr. Yowarski apologizes for the late filing of opposition papers. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

General Motors LLC's unopposed demurrer is sustained with leave to amend.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-21-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Punitive Damages From Plaintiffs' Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-21-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT GENERAL MOTORS LLC's Motion To Strike Punitive Damages From Plaintiffs' Complaint.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

General Motors LLC's motion to strike is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 435.5, which requires that the parties conduct a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a motion to strike is filed. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately and General Motors LLC's response to the complaint is now due by April 18, 2023.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
